← SinoMed 经络腧穴临床速查Meridians & Points
经络腧穴临床速查Meridians & Points
收入 361 个经穴。每穴从穴名由来、气血运行、局部解剖、功效主治到刺法灸法，密切结合临床应用。361 channel points. Each worked through its name's origin, how qi and blood move, its regional anatomy, functions and indications, and needling & moxa — kept close to clinical use.
📖
总论Foundations
经络系统、腧穴分类、定位法——先懂原理。Channels, point categories, locating — the principles first.
🧭
十四经穴Fourteen Channels
14 条经脉 → 循行、病候 → 本经每个穴。14 channels → course & disorders → every point.
🎯
按主治反查By what it treats
从症状/功效出发，反查哪些穴、为什么。From a symptom or function, find which points — and why.
⭐
常用穴速览Common points
临床高频穴一览，新手先掌握这些。The high-frequency clinical points to learn first.
🔑
特定穴Specific points
五输、原络、俞募、八会…概念、应用与全部穴。Five-Shu, Yuan-Luo, Shu-Mu… concept, use & members.
☯
气机作用导航By qi dynamic
按主导气机看穴：升清、降浊、宣通、收敛、交通上下。Points by the qi they drive: raising, descending, diffusing, astringing, connecting.
🌀
奇经八脉Extraordinary Vessels
督任冲带、阴阳维跷——循行、交会穴与主病，一页速览。Du, Ren, Chong, Dai & the Wei/Qiao — course, confluent points & disorders at a glance.
🎯
经外奇穴Extra Points
十四经以外的常用奇穴，按部位分列——太阳、定喘、夹脊、十宣…Common non-channel points by region — Taiyang, Dingchuan, Jiaji, Shixuan…
⚠️
针刺安全警示Needling Safety
需特别留意的穴——气胸、血管、神经、眼周风险与刺法禁忌。Points to watch — pneumothorax, vessel, nerve & peri-orbital risks and needling cautions.
📝
自测练习Self-Test
定位、归经、特定穴、主治、安全五类混合出题，练习与测验双模式。Location, channel, specific points, indications & safety — mixed questions, practice & test modes.

选一条经，看它的循行、气血多少、病候和本经全部腧穴。Pick a channel to see its course, qi-blood balance, disorders, and all its points.

按主治反查Reverse Lookup
输入一个症状或功效，看看哪些穴的哪个功效能治它，以及为什么。Type a symptom or function to see which points treat it, through which function, and why.

常用穴速览Common Points
⭐ 这些是临床上出镜最多的穴，按经归好了。刚上手的话，先把它们的定位、功效和主治拿下。⭐ The points you'll reach for most often in clinic, gathered by channel. If you're starting out, get their location, function and indications down first.

特定穴Specific Points

总论Foundations
先懂经络与腧穴的原理，再学具体的穴。Understand the principles of channels and points before the individual points.

针刺安全警示Needling Safety
这些穴在刺法上要格外留心，按风险类型分了组。每张卡片标出风险所在与刺法要点；想看完整定位和刺灸法，进入该穴即可。安全永远排在疗效前面。These points call for extra care when needling, grouped here by the kind of risk. Each card flags where the danger lies and the key needling caution; open a point for its full location and method. Safety always comes before effect.
